title: LumiKids Numbers
prompt:
Playful 2D illustration for a kids numbers learning card, friendly numbers 1 2 3 with stars and rounded blocks, pastel palette, premium children's education style, clean composition, no text beyond decorative numbers

Avoid: photorealistic, scary, cluttered, watermark, logo, words, dark mood
